overall.description: A cinematic aerial tracking shot from Cyberpunk 2077 following a large teal cargo airship as it flies over a futuristic dystopian city during a smoggy golden hour sunset. The camera smoothly tracks the airship from the dense neon-lit urban core out toward the open coast, showcasing towering skyscrapers and industrial structures before transitioning to open waters.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk downtown with neon skyscrapers and industrial towers

agents.ego_description: flying steadily behind the cargo airship maintaining consistent distance while surveying the urban skyline

notable_agents.action: large teal cargo airship flying steadily over downtown with dim engine glow

entered.detail: massive teal-colored cargo airship with cylindrical body and rear thrusters
tall futuristic buildings with glowing neon signs and holographic displays
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
tall rust-colored industrial building with white number 12 signage
cluster of tall smokestacks emitting faint smoke

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a stabilized aerial view tracking a massive teal cargo airship as it cruises over a dense cyberpunk cityscape. Neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic billboards fill the left side while industrial towers and smokestacks occupy the right, all bathed in warm golden hour light through a hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal transition zone with industrial towers and emerging ocean view

events.description: airship's rear engines brighten significantly from dim to intense orange glow
view transitions from dense urban environment to open coastal waters

agents.ego_description: continuing to track the airship as it passes industrial towers and approaches the coastline

notable_agents.action: cargo airship with bright glowing engines flying past industrial towers toward the coast

entered.detail: dark ocean water becoming visible at the city edge
hazy mountain silhouette on the horizon

segments.scene_description: As the airship's engines flare bright orange, the camera follows it past the industrial towers toward the coast. The dense cityscape recedes behind while the ocean and distant mountains emerge on the right, marking a transition from urban to coastal environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal waters with distant mountain range

events.description: city skyline fades into hazy distance leaving only open water and mountains

agents.ego_description: tracking the airship over open water as the urban environment disappears completely from view

notable_agents.action: cargo airship flying steadily over open ocean toward the distant horizon

entered.detail: expansive dark water surface reflecting the golden sunset light
distant mountain silhouette along the coastline

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the airship flying over open coastal waters with the city now far behind. The camera maintains its steady tracking shot as the industrial towers fade into the haze, leaving only the expansive ocean, distant mountains, and the glowing airship against the warm sunset sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial tracking movement that transitions from a dense, neon-lit urban core to an expansive coastal horizon. It begins by trailing a massive teal cargo airship as it cruises through a hazy golden hour atmosphere, flanked by holographic billboards and industrial smokestacks. As the airship's engines flare bright orange, the camera pushes forward, causing the crowded cityscape to recede while the ocean and distant mountains gradually emerge on the right. The scene then opens further into a coastal environment, with the industrial towers fading into the smog as the airship moves over open waters. Finally, the camera maintains its steady glide, leaving the city far behind to frame the glowing vessel against a vast ocean and a warm sunset sky.
